titulo_pt: Lawmaker McGovern: Americans need to ‘fight for the soul’ of the US
texto_pt: The left is rising because Americans ‘want more from the Democrats’, US Representative Jim McGovern argues.

titulo_pt: US Congressman denies existence of Palestinians in interview
texto_pt: US Congressman Randy Fine claims “there is no such thing as Palestinian”, on interview show The Next Generation.

titulo_pt: 50 Houthi fighters killed in renewed clashes in Yemen
texto_pt: Yemeni government officials say the Houthis launched a surprise offensive targeting army barracks in southern Hodeidah.

titulo_pt: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
texto_pt: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

titulo_pt: Osaka knocks out top-seeded Sabalenka to reach Wimbledon quarterfinals
texto_pt: Naomi Osaka beat world number one Sabalenka in straight sets to book her maiden Wimbledon quarterfinal.

titulo_pt: Watch: Lyse Doucet on emotion and politics at Tehran funeral of former supreme leader
texto_pt: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Tehran where funeral events are taking place in honour of Iran's former leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
